residual_risks: The shared working tree still contains concurrent external OpenClaw/bootstrap WIP and a modified scripts/validate-team-doc.mjs; isolate this managed-doc change set or resolve that external validator work before relying on the live working tree as a merge-ready whole.

Repo-local managed docs do not prove live EAS/OTA/store rollback, production submit approval, external platform state, or human/ops execution; that boundary remains governed by mobile-app-dev-team/20-app-eas-ota-rollback-runbook.md:50 and mobile-app-dev-team/15-human-ops-live-readiness-annex.md:121.
P-1 through P-4 are managed-doc governance only; runtime enforcement in skills or validators remains deferred until a separate scoped implementation updates those artifacts.
